nodes.name: Webhook: Draft Message
nodes.notes: POST /webhook/draft-message. Body: { lead_id, desired_template (e.g. 'site_visit_invite'), trigger_event (e.g. 'LEAD_SCORED'). Optional: visit_slots[] }. Called by Lead Agent on LEAD_SCORED or by the dashboard manually.

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ 'Trigger: ' + $('Code: Build Drafting Context').first().json.event_name + ', template: ' + $('Code: Parse & Validate Draft').first().json.template_name }}

={{ $('Code: Parse & Validate Draft').first().json.template_name + ' drafted ' + $('Code: Parse & Validate Draft').first().json.language.toUpperCase() + ', ' + $('Code: Parse & Validate Draft').first().json.content.length + ' chars' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, message_id: $('Supabase: Insert Pending Message').first().json.id, status: 'pending_approval' } }}

nodes.name: Webhook: Approve Message
nodes.notes: POST /webhook/approve-message. Headers must include X-Approval-Token (validated by Header Auth credential). Body: { message_id, action: 'approve'|'edit_approve'|'reject', new_content?, reason? }. Called by the dashboard's Approve/Edit/Reject buttons.

nodes.name: Twilio: Send WhatsApp
nodes.notes: TWILIO_WHATSAPP_FROM env var should be 'whatsapp:+14155238886' for the Twilio sandbox. Receiver phones must have opted in via 'join <sandbox-code>'.

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message_id: $('Code: Prep Twilio Send').first().json.message_id, twilio_sid: $('Twilio: Send WhatsApp').first().json.sid || null, was_edited: $('Code: Prep Twilio Send').first().json.was_edited }) }}
={{ $('Webhook: Approve Message').first().json.body.action === 'reject' ? 'Rejected: ' + ($('Webhook: Approve Message').first().json.body.reason || 'no reason') : 'Sent via Twilio' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, message_id: $('Webhook: Approve Message').first().json.body.message_id, action: $('Webhook: Approve Message').first().json.body.action, status: $('Webhook: Approve Message').first().json.body.action === 'reject' ? 'rejected' : 'sent', twilio_sid: $('Twilio: Send WhatsApp').first()?.json?.sid || null } }}
